scripts.dev: npm run build -w @dealseal/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @dealseal/api" "npm run dev -w @dealseal/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @dealseal/shared && npm run build -w @dealseal/api && npm run build -w @dealseal/web
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run start -w @dealseal/api" "npm run start -w @dealseal/web"
scripts.db:seed: npm run db:generate -w @dealseal/api && npm run db:seed -w @dealseal/api
